title: Building AI Agents for Real-World Problems & Workflows
summary: Shailaja Patel-Pranav explains how AI agents operate in production systems with workflows, policies, and orchestration. The content emphasizes agent coordination, rule enforcement, and alignment with human decision-making in real-world deployments.
writeup: Shailaja Patel-Pranav walks through how AI agents function inside production systems, covering workflows, policies, and orchestration. The video focuses on coordinating multiple agents, enforcing rules, and keeping agent behavior aligned with human decision-making in real-world deployments. Takeaways center on agent orchestration, policy enforcement, and human-in-the-loop oversight as the structural pieces of practical workflow automation.
